name: The House of Voracity | 噬人之屋
short_description: The House of Voracity | 噬人之屋 is a horror game about a house keeper. You play as a house keeper who accepts a job to manage a remote house. As you carry out your duties, you gradually notice that a great malevolence targeting you is lurking in the darkness.
detailed_description:
The House of Voracity | 噬人之屋 is a horror game about a house keeper. You play as a house keeper who accepts a job to manage a remote house. As you carry out your duties, you gradually notice that a great malevolence targeting you is lurking in the darkness.

Key Features:

Immersive experience: An atmospheric, photo-realistic graphics intensifies the horror experience.

Gameplay: This game is primarily a "walking simulator" genre with puzzle-solving and working-simulating elements.

Thrilling horror: This game contain thrilling action elements like hiding and escaping from ghosts.

Psychological horror: The environment and story will drive you suspenseful.

2 endings: There are good and bad.

The House of Voracity | 噬人之屋 is a short game. The game is about 1hour long.
